title: Corrigendum: Analysis and Evaluation of Using Microsecond-Latency Memory for In-Memory Indices and Caches in SSD-Based Key-Value Stores: [Experiments & Analysis]
abstract: This is a corrigendum for the article ''Analysis and Evaluation of Using Microsecond-Latency Memory for In-Memory Indices and Caches in SSD-Based Key-Value Stores: [Experiments & Analysis]'' published in Proc. ACM Manag. Data 3, 6 (SIGMOD), Article 294 (December 2025), 28 pages.
